spacing_and_layout.strategy: Mode B: The Control Room Grid (For Dashboards / Analytics)
spacing_and_layout.surface_treatment: Cardless or flat cards with sharp edges or max 6px radius (rounded-md). 1px solid border (#27272A), no drop shadows.
spacing_and_layout.navigation: Left sidebar (w-64) with dense link list. Top bar (h-14) with global search.
spacing_and_layout.pos_layout: Split view: 70% product grid (left), 30% active cart/checkout panel (right). High density.
spacing_and_layout.padding: p-4 md:p-6 for standard views, p-2 for high-density tables.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-500 text-white hover:bg-blue-600 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-colors

components_and_interactions.tables: Dense rows. Sticky header with bg-zinc-900 border-b border-zinc-800. Hover row bg-zinc-800/50. Tabular figures for all financial data.
components_and_interactions.nlq_search: Command palette style (Linear inspired). Blur backdrop (backdrop-blur-md bg-black/40), centered modal, rich results rendering tables/charts within the chat response.
components_and_interactions.pos_keyboard_hints: Use small <kbd> style tags (bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 border border-zinc-700 rounded px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px]) next to key actions (e.g., 'Pay [Space]', 'Search [Ctrl+K]').
components_and_interactions.badges: Flat color backgrounds with opacity (e.g., bg-red-500/10 text-red-500) for stock alerts (Low, Out of Stock, Expiring).

motion.hover: Fast opacity and color changes (duration-150 ease-in-out).
motion.panels: Slide in from right for POS cart or slide down for NLQ search (framer-motion, stiffness: 300, damping: 30).

icons: lucide-react. Use 16px (w-4 h-4) or 20px for dense UI alignment.

image_urls.description: Monochrome geometric abstract background for login and onboarding wizard.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items, table rows) using kebab-case role-based naming.
Ensure 'dark' class is applied to the root HTML or body to activate Tailwind dark mode globally.
Do NOT use HTML native date pickers or selects; heavily customize Shadcn UI Select, Dialog, Popover, and Calendar to match the dark linear aesthetic (bg-[#18181B] border-[#27272A]).
For the POS screen, implement responsive layouts prioritizing wide screens, showing a fast product grid alongside a persistent cart sidebar.
Dashboard charts should use Recharts with colors matching the palette (e.g., #3B82F6 for primary metrics). Remove standard Recharts grid lines or set them to stroke='#27272A'.
Empty states for tables/charts MUST show a subtle instruction and CTA (e.g., 'No items in cart', 'Add PO').
Maintain high contrast ratios for accessibility. Do not use pure black text on dark backgrounds.
